args.text: auth-api confirmed on v5.8.4 and session-store confirmed on v2.2.9. Both patches deployed successfully.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body: Both affected services have been patched and verified: auth-api is running v5.8.4 and session-store is running v2.2.9.

args.comment: auth-api and session-store patched and verified (v5.8.4 / v2.2.9).

args.text: Credential rotation complete: active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: As part of remediation for CVE-2026-30117, signing keys and refresh tokens have been rotated tonight. You will need to sign in again on all devices.
